name: The Cracked Seal
specialty: Specializing in the acquisition of ancient, rare, and sometimes cursed tomes, their expertise lies in navigating the labyrinthine rift-torn libraries beneath the Undercity.

members.name: Sylas Ironheart
members.note: A battle-hardened warrior with a heavy scar that runs down his left cheek, a reminder of a past defeat that he still carries with him.

members.name: Kaelis Swiftleaf
members.note: Rumored to have unearthed a forbidden grimoire from the depths of the Tower of Last Chance, his powers are both feared and respected throughout the Undercity.

visual: The pair can often be seen clad in leather armor and armed with enchanted staffs, a book of ancient lore always at hand. They move with a practiced grace, their eyes scanning the bustling crowd for potential leads.
reputation_note: Whispers follow them through the Undercity; tales of their daring exploits and unearthed treasures fill the taverns, while warnings of their unpredictable nature echo from the lips of those who have crossed them.
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a patrol-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
